title: N-12 (disambiguation)
content:
'''N-12''' or '''N12''' may refer to:

==Canon==
*grid square N-12 of the [[Standard Galactic Grid]]
**[[:Category:Locations in grid square N-12]]

==Legends==
*[[A'den Skirata]], originally known as Null-12, also known as N-12, a Null-class Advanced Recon Commando
*[[N12]], a section of the Death Star
*the [[N-12 Combat Saboteur]], a type of blaster pistol available during the Cold War between the Galactic Republic and the Sith Empire
*the [[N-12 Rampage-X carbine]], a type of blaster carbine produced during the Cold War between the Galactic Republic and the reconstituted Sith Empire
*[[Form N-12]], which members of the Republic Army could file to request additional and non-conventional forces

{{disambig}}
